---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 💡 Motivation
Please explain the motivation for this feature. What problem does it solve? What use cases does it support?

## 📝 Detailed Description
Provide a detailed description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## 🎯 Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📸 Mockups / Examples
If applicable, add mockups, screenshots, or examples to help explain your feature request.

## 🔧 Implementation Details
If you have thoughts on how this should be implemented, please share them here.

## 📊 Impact Assessment
- **Users affected**: [e.g. All users, Power users, Admins]
- **Breaking changes**: [Yes/No]
- **Performance impact**: [Low/Medium/High]

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I have searched through the existing issues to make sure this feature has not been requested already
- [ ] I have provided enough information for the maintainers to understand and evaluate the request
- [ ] I have considered the impact on existing users and functionality
- [ ] I have followed the repository's contribution guidelines
